name: code-review
description: Strict code review orchestrator - dispatches code-style, test-validation, test-minimizer, and refactoring-safety reviewers in parallel, plus spec-compliance, per-language packs (Python and TypeScript), and skill review when relevant, across 34+ patterns plus 4 judgment-guided design principles (KISS/YAGNI/DRY/SOLID). Run /strict-review to analyze your branch diff.
